creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
This doesn't seem to do anything with go.mk or ports environment.

Looking at https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=243776#c6, "github.com/googleapis/gax-go/v2" GH_TUPLE entry probably just needs "v2" suffix removed [1].

[1] https://github.com/golang/go/wiki/Modules#semantic-import-versioning
